entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied for nutrient response and yield across different landscape positions

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measured productivity of maize, expressed in t ha−1

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of the soil to provide essential nutrients for plant growth

entities.name: SOIL PROPERTIES
entities.description: The physical and chemical characteristics of the soil that vary by landscape position

entities.name: NUTRIENT USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which the crop utilizes applied nutrients to produce yield

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A primary macronutrient identified as a yield-limiting factor for maize

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A primary macronutrient identified as a yield-limiting factor for maize

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A macronutrient found to have non-significant effects on maize yield in this study

entities.name: SULFUR
entities.description: A nutrient found to have non-significant effects on maize yield in this study

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A micronutrient found to have non-significant effects on maize yield in this study

entities.name: BORON
entities.description: A micronutrient found to have non-significant effects on maize yield in this study

entities.name: NUTRIENT OMISSION TRIALS
entities.description: Experimental approach used to determine the necessity of specific nutrients by omitting them from treatments

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The statistical experimental design used to arrange treatments across replications and positions

entities.name: BLENDED FERTILIZER
entities.description: A form of nutrient application where individual fertilizers are mixed

entities.name: COMPOUND FERTILIZER
entities.description: A form of nutrient application where nutrients are chemically combined into a single granule

entities.name: INDIVIDUAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: A form of nutrient application where nutrients are applied separately

entities.name: FOOT SLOPE
entities.description: The lowest landscape position, associated with the highest soil fertility and grain yield

entities.name: MID-SLOPE
entities.description: The intermediate landscape position

entities.name: HILLSLOPE
entities.description: The highest landscape position, associated with the lowest soil fertility and grain yield

entities.name: TROPICAL AGROECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: The general environmental and climatic setting of the cereal mixed farming systems
